site.title: International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: From accessibility need to public repo
nav.label: Primary
meta.home.description: IATF turns real accessibility needs into public open source repositories.
meta.projects.description: Browse public accessibility projects published through IATF.
meta.propose.description: Request an accessibility project from IATF through the web, email, or Discord.
meta.governance.description: Read how IATF accepts projects, manages repositories, and keeps work public.
meta.join.description: Ways to take part in IATF: contribute code, translate, test, or maintain a project.
meta.accessibility.description: How IATF aims to keep this website accessible and how to report an accessibility barrier.
meta.transparency.description: Public records of IATF: decisions, projects, and updates kept open by default.
registry.empty.title: No projects published yet
registry.empty.body: IATF is preparing its first public project set.
proposal.form.title: Send a request
proposal.form.body: Fill the form below to send a request to IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript is required to use this web form. If it is unavailable, use email or Discord instead.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission is not configured in this environment. This form will open your email client instead.
proposal.form.ready: Secure submission is ready. When you send the request, IATF will create an intake record.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Please complete the spam protection check before sending.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Spam protection expired. Please complete the check again before sending.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Spam protection could not be verified right now. Please try again.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Spam protection timed out. Please try the check again.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Please complete the required fields before sending.
proposal.form.success: Thanks. Your request was received and stored for review.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: If you contact IATF again about this request, include the reference below.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while sending the request. Please try again. If the problem continues, use email instead.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Plain English source, translations may be added later
footer.label: Site footer
footer.blurb: Accessibility work should be easier to start, easier to publish, and easier to keep open.
footer.source: Accessibility standards reference: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Practice informed by assistive technology users.
contact.label: Contact
translation.label: Translation status
translation.source: English is the canonical source language for this page.
translation.humanReviewed: This translation has been reviewed by a fluent speaker.
translation.machineAssisted: This translation is machine-assisted and has not yet been fully reviewed by a fluent speaker. Suggestions are welcome through GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: This translation was reviewed before the latest English source update and may need revision.
